Headline: Temporary Reroute at Kedzie/65th
ShortDescription: 52A buses are temporarily rerouted via Kedzie, 63rd, California, 71st, and Kedzie due to, street blockage near Kedzie/65th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
52A buses are temporarily rerouted via Kedzie, 63rd, California, 71st, and Kedzie due to, street blockage near Kedzie/65th.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #72 North buses Temporary Reroute near North Avenue/Elston
ShortDescription: Westbound 72 North buses are temporarily rerouted due to street a blockage near North Avenue/Elston.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #72 North buses are temporarily rerouted via North Avenue, Elston, Cortland, Ashland, then resume normal route on North Avenue, due to street blockage near North Avenue/Elston.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
